evals.prompt: I'm going on PTO next week, June 9-13. Can you set up my OOO?
evals.expected_output: Agent collects leave details, discovers recipients via calendar analysis, presents tiered recipient list, creates calendar invite with showAs=free after confirmation, sets Slack status, provides email auto-reply instructions.

assertions.check: get_current_time was called to establish today's date
whoami or get_signed_in_user was called to detect user identity
calendar_view was called to discover recent meeting attendees
User was asked to confirm recipient list before calendar invite was sent
calendar_create_event was called with showAs='free'
User was presented with manual auto-reply setup instructions

evals.prompt: Just set my Slack status to OOO for tomorrow please.
evals.expected_output: Agent skips the full action menu, confirms Slack status details (text, emoji, expiration), and sets the status via slack_users_profile_set. Does not send calendar invites or configure auto-reply.

assertions.check: Agent recognized partial request and did not present the full action menu
slack_users_profile_set was called with status_text, status_emoji, and status_expiration in profile JSON
No calendar_create_event call was made

evals.prompt: Set up OOO for me. I'm out June 9-13, Sarah is my backup.
evals.expected_output: Agent uses provided backup contact, drafts default OOO message mentioning Sarah, proceeds through recipient discovery, and gates all notification actions behind confirmation.

assertions.check: Default OOO message was generated mentioning Sarah as backup contact
kg_search was called to discover additional collaborators
User was asked to confirm before every notification-generating action

evals.prompt: I need to set up my out of office. I'll be gone June 9-20.
evals.expected_output: Agent discovers recipients via calendar_view. If recipient count exceeds 20, a warning about notification volume is displayed before asking for confirmation.

assertions.check: calendar_view was called to pull recent meetings for attendee frequency analysis
If recipient count exceeds 20, a warning about notification volume was shown
Recipients were grouped into tiers and presented with counts

evals.prompt: Going on leave June 30 through July 4. Set up my OOO status on Slack now.
evals.expected_output: Agent warns that setting status now (more than 1 day before leave) would make the user appear OOO prematurely. Offers alternatives: set now anyway, or reminder for start date.

assertions.check: Agent warned about premature OOO status since leave is more than 1 day away
Agent offered alternatives: set now anyway or set a reminder for the start date

evals.prompt: I'm taking a half day off this Friday afternoon. Can you set up OOO?
evals.expected_output: Agent recognizes partial-day leave, asks for specific hours (e.g., leaving at noon), creates calendar event with specific start/end times rather than all-day, and adjusts messaging status accordingly.

assertions.check: Agent confirmed the partial-day details (specific hours, not full day)
calendar_create_event was called with specific time-bounded start and end, not all-day
Status expiration was set to Monday morning, not Friday evening

evals.prompt: Set up OOO for June 9-13. Include external stakeholders in the calendar invite.
evals.expected_output: Agent discovers recipients, separates external (different domain) into Tier 4, flags them clearly, confirms user explicitly wants to include external recipients, then adds them as optional attendees.

assertions.check: External recipients were flagged separately from internal recipients
User was explicitly asked to confirm inclusion of external recipients
calendar_create_event was called with external emails in optionalAttendees

evals.prompt: I'm going on vacation next month. Can you block my calendar and set auto-reply? My backup is Mike for engineering and Lisa for customer issues.
evals.expected_output: Agent asks for specific dates since only 'next month' was given, handles multiple backup contacts in the OOO message, creates calendar invite, and provides auto-reply text with both contacts mentioned plus manual setup instructions.

assertions.check: Agent asked for specific start and end dates since 'next month' is ambiguous
OOO message includes both Mike (engineering) and Lisa (customer issues) as contacts
Manual auto-reply instructions were provided with platform-specific steps
